action_set_definitions.name: get_warehouse_config
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the warehouse layout, including internal IDs for specific locations (docks, charging stations) and the travel cost matrix (battery consumption units) between all locations.

action_set_definitions.name: get_pallets_at_location
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all pallets currently located at a specific location ID. All pallets found at Dock_In_A are considered high-priority for this task.

location_id.description: The unique ID of the location to scan.

action_set_definitions.name: get_robot_diagnostics
action_set_definitions.description: Returns the current state of all mobile robots, including their unique IDs, current battery percentages, current locations, and operational status.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_move_task
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a robot to pick up a specific pallet and transport it to a destination.

destination_id.description: The ID of the destination location.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_recharge
action_set_definitions.description: Directs a robot to move to a charging station and begin charging.

station_id.description: The ID of the charging station.

state_description.robots: List of active robots in the warehouse and their current statuses.
state_description.tasks: List of pending and active warehouse tasks.
state_description.warehouse_map: Definition of locations and travel costs between them.
